zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers於大約1253年出生在英國德比夏爾時，她的父親Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby62歲，母親Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby36歲。她於大約1274年與Robert De Mucegros在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。她去世於1281年5月9日在英國薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers于大约1253年出生在英国德比夏爾时，她的父亲Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby62岁，母亲Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby36岁。她于大约1274年与Robert De Mucegros在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。她去世于1281年5月9日在英国薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: 'The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Dorothea  , also used independently.

nameMeanings.name: Younger'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Northumberland and eastern Scotland): from Middle English yungre ‘younger’, comparative of Young , used to distinguish a younger man from an older man bearing the same personal name (typically, father and son). In one case, at least, however, the name is known to have been borne by an immigrant Fleming, and was probably an Americanized form of Middle Dutch jongheer ‘young nobleman’ (see Jonker ).
Americanized form of various cognate or like-sounding names in other languages, notably German   Junger   and   Junker  , or Dutch   Jonker  .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers was born about 1253, in Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, was 62 and her mother, Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby, was 36. She married Robert De Mucegros about 1274, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. She died on 9 May 1281, in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers est née environ 1253, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Robert De Mucegros environ 1274, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 9 mai 1281, à Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers um 1253 in Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby 62 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby 36. Sie hat um 1274 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Robert De Mucegros geheiratet. Sie starb am 9. Mai 1281 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers è nata il circa 1253 nel Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, aveva 62 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Robert De Mucegros circa 1274, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 9 maggio 1281, nel Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrersが約1253年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derbyは62歳，母Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derbyは36歳であった。約1274年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでRobert De Mucegrosと結婚した。彼女は1281年5月9日にイギリスソメルセトチャールトン ムスグローブで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers(이)가 대략 1253년 영국 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby(은)는 62세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1274년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Robert De Mucegros(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1281년 5월 9일 영국 서머세트 찰턴 무스그로브에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers nasceu aproximadamente 1253, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert De Mucegros aproximadamente 1274, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 9 de maio de 1281, em Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers родилась около 1253 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert De Mucegros около 1274 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 9 мая 1281 г. в местности чарлтон мусгров, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes 'The Younger' de Ferrers nació aproximadamente 1253, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Ferrers 5th Earl of Derby, tenía 62 años y su mamá, Margaret de Quincy Countess of Derby, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Robert De Mucegros aproximadamente 1274, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 9 de mayo de 1281, en Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 29 años.
